Satvik · Blast Frozen · Ready to Cook
Homestyle Flatbreads.
Commercial Scale.
100% Satvik, preservative-free chapatis, puris, bhatura and wraps — blast-frozen at –18°C and ready to cook in 60 seconds. No maida, no palm oil, no shortcuts. Built for commercial kitchens that demand consistency, hygiene and scale.
